title: csv-to-object-mapper inputs
description: Typed inputs for the csv-to-object-mapper runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

csv_header.description: Example from AGENT.md: comma-separated header line, OR a bullet list of column names with 1-2 sample values Required column: 'yes'.
csv_header.example: comma-separated header line, OR a bullet list of column names with 1-2 sample values

target_object.description: Example from AGENT.md: `Account` | `new:<ProposedName>` (if creating a new object) Required column: 'no'.

mode.description: Example from AGENT.md: `map` (default — map to existing fields, create missing ones) | `create-new-object` (design a new object from the CSV) Required column: 'no'.
